meals.name: Boiled Egg with Sourdough & Berries
meals.image_prompt: overhead of soft-boiled egg in eggcup beside toasted sourdough with butter, fresh raspberries scattered, natural morning light, ceramic plate
prep_steps: Boil 14 eggs (7 for each day Mon–Thu) in salted water 7 min, cool in ice bath, store in fridge
day_of_steps: Toast 1 slice sourdough, spread 1 tsp butter

meals.name: Almonds & Apple
meals.image_prompt: scattered raw almonds beside a whole crisp apple, wooden surface, natural light, simple, healthy snack
day_of_steps: Portion 30g raw almonds into small bowl

meals.name: Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Vegetables & Quinoa
meals.image_prompt: plate of grilled chicken breast fanned, golden-brown, beside roasted zucchini and bell peppers, fluffy quinoa, drizzle of olive oil and fresh lemon, warm light
prep_steps: Grill 800g chicken breasts (seasoned with oregano, lemon, garlic), cool, store in fridge
Roast mixed vegetables (400g zucchini, 300g red bell pepper, 200g cherry tomatoes) at 200°C for 25 min with 2 tbsp olive oil, cool and store
Cook 200g dried quinoa (yields ~600g cooked), store in fridge
day_of_steps: Drizzle with 1 tsp olive oil and squeeze fresh lemon

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Almonds
meals.image_prompt: creamy greek yogurt in small white bowl topped with chopped almonds and a drizzle of honey, spoon resting inside, soft natural light
day_of_steps: Spoon 200g plain Greek yogurt into bowl

meals.name: Baked White Fish with Lemon & Green Beans
meals.image_prompt: pan-baked white fish fillet, flaky, topped with fresh lemon slice, beside tender steamed green beans tossed with olive oil, ceramic plate, warm golden light
day_of_steps: Place 200g white fish (cod or hake) on parchment, season with salt, pepper, fresh lemon juice
Meanwhile, steam 250g fresh green beans 6 min until tender-crisp
Toss green beans with 1 tsp olive oil and fresh herbs

meals.name: Asian Chicken Lettuce Cups with Bok Choy
meals.image_prompt: crisp butter lettuce leaves filled with shredded ginger chicken, topped with sesame seeds, steamed bok choy on side, drizzle of sesame oil, Asian plating
prep_steps: Shred 400g cooked chicken, toss with 2 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tsp sesame oil, 1 tsp fresh ginger, store in fridge
Steam 300g bok choy (6 min), cool, store in fridge
day_of_steps: Take 150g shredded chicken mixture from prep batch
Arrange 4 butter lettuce leaves on plate

meals.image_prompt: thick greek yogurt in small bowl, topped with toasted almonds and a light drizzle, wooden spoon, soft daylight

meals.name: Pan-Seared Salmon with Roasted Asparagus & Sweet Potato
meals.image_prompt: pan-seared salmon fillet, pink flesh, crispy skin, beside roasted purple asparagus and orange roasted sweet potato wedges, drizzle of lemon, white plate, warm light
day_of_steps: Toss 200g sweet potato (cubed) with 0.5 tsp olive oil, roast 15 min
Meanwhile, heat 0.5 tsp olive oil in pan over medium-high
Season 180g salmon fillet with salt, pepper
Sear skin-side down 4 min, flip, cook 2 min more (medium-rare)
Toss 200g fresh asparagus with 0.5 tsp olive oil, add to oven, roast 8 min until tender

meals.name: Spiced Turkey Meatballs with Brown Lentil Salad
meals.image_prompt: six browned turkey meatballs arranged on plate, served over warm brown lentil salad with diced cucumber, cherry tomatoes, and red onion dressed in olive oil & lemon vinaigrette
prep_steps: Mix 500g ground turkey with 1 tsp dried oregano, 0.5 tsp cumin, salt, pepper, form 18 meatballs, bake at 190°C for 18 min, cool, store in fridge
Cook 200g dried brown lentils (yields ~600g cooked), toss with 100g diced cucumber, 100g cherry tomatoes (halved), 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 tbsp balsamic vinegar, fresh herbs, store in fridge
day_of_steps: Reheat 6 turkey meatballs in oven (180°C, 5 min)

day_of_steps: Spoon 200g plain Greek yogurt into bowl

meals.name: Mexican-Style Ground Beef & Chickpea Bowl
meals.image_prompt: warm bowl with seasoned ground beef, chickpeas, roasted red peppers, shredded lettuce, cherry tomatoes, lime wedge, sprinkle of cilantro, wooden spoon, vibrant colours
prep_steps: Brown 400g lean ground beef (5% fat) with 1 tsp cumin, 0.5 tsp chilli powder, 1 tsp garlic powder, salt, pepper; drain; cool, store in fridge
Toss 1 can (400g) drained chickpeas with 100g roasted red pepper (from jar), 1 tsp olive oil, fresh lime juice, store in fridge
day_of_steps: Warm 100g cooked ground beef in pan
Arrange 150g shredded romaine lettuce in bowl

meals.name: Pan-Seared Tuna Steak with Sesame Vegetables & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: seared tuna steak, medium-rare pink centre, beside stir-fried bok choy and snap peas with sesame oil, served on fluffy brown rice, sesame seeds, warm Asian plating
day_of_steps: Cook 120g brown rice (yields ~300g cooked) while preparing protein & veg
Heat 0.75 tsp sesame oil in wok over high heat
Stir-fry 200g bok choy and 150g snap peas for 4 min, add 1 tsp soy sauce, remove to plate
Heat 0.5 tsp sesame oil in pan, sear 180g tuna steak 2 min each side (medium-rare)
Serve tuna over rice with vegetables

Meanwhile, place 200g white fish on parchment

Add fish to tray, bake 10 min until opaque

meals.name: French-Style Braised Beef with Root Vegetables
meals.image_prompt: tender braised beef cubes in rich brown sauce, surrounded by glazed pearl onions, carrots, mushrooms, fresh thyme, white dish, warm inviting light
day_of_steps: Heat 1 tsp olive oil in heavy-bottomed pot over medium-high
Brown 200g beef chuck (cubed) 4 min per side, season with salt, pepper, remove
Add 100g pearl onions (peeled), 150g diced carrots, 100g mushrooms (sliced), sauté 5 min
Deglaze with 100 ml low-sodium beef stock and 1 tbsp red wine vinegar
Return beef to pot, add 2 sprigs fresh thyme, simmer covered 20 min until beef is tender
Serve in shallow dish with vegetables and light sauce

meals.name: Chickpea & Vegetable Salad with Tahini Dressing
meals.image_prompt: bowl of creamy white chickpeas, diced cucumber, cherry tomatoes, roasted red pepper, fresh parsley and mint, tahini drizzle, lemon, Mediterranean colours
prep_steps: Mix 1 can (400g) drained chickpeas with 100g roasted red pepper (from jar), 100g diced cucumber, 100g halved cherry tomatoes, 2 tbsp fresh parsley, fresh mint
Make tahini dressing: 2 tbsp tahini, 2 tbsp lemon juice, 1 tbsp water, 1 clove minced garlic, salt, pepper
Toss vegetables with dressing, store in fridge
day_of_steps: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of legumes only keeps ~5 day(s), and this is day 7. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)
Measure 200g chickpea & vegetable salad into bowl
Serve at room temperature or chilled
meals.safety_note: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of legumes only keeps ~5 day(s), and this is day 7. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)

meals.image_prompt: stuffed whole-grain pita pocket overflowing with grilled zucchini, bell pepper, eggplant, chickpeas, tzatziki, fresh herbs, vibrant Mediterranean, side plate
prep_steps: Grill or pan-fry mixed vegetables: 200g zucchini, 150g bell pepper (red/yellow), 100g eggplant, all sliced; brush with 1 tsp olive oil, season with oregano, salt, pepper; cook 8 min total, cool, store in fridge
day_of_steps: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of vegetables cooked only keeps ~4 day(s), and this is day 7. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)
Spread 2 tbsp plain Greek yogurt mixed with 1 tsp lemon juice and 0.5 tsp dried dill inside pocket (tzatziki-style)
Fill with 150g grilled vegetables and 60g cooked chickpeas (from prep_batch_6)
